title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 03 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 03/08/2021
Image reference: 2021-08-03_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-03-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Modern tonnage has firmed slightly. VLCC Tsuruga (310,000 DWT, Oct 2009, Imabari) sold to Cyprus Maritime Co for USD 38.00 mil, VV value USD 41.91 mil. MR2 Grand Ace 2 (46,000 DWT, Mar 2006, STX Offshore) sold to Aerio Shipmanagement for USD 9.30 mil, VV value USD 10.16 mil - SS/DD Passed.
